items.title: Iran Says It Is Reviewing a U.S. Proposal to End the War
items.summary: Nothing was disclosed about the peace plan, and there were conflicting signals from the Iranians about how seriously they were taking it.

items.title: Gas tax: How beer fuelled a debate on Australia's energy giants
